class.name: PERSONAL_EMP

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, t0.e_numero_legajo as e_numero_legajo, t0.f_desde_ubicacion as f_desde_ubicacion, t0.c_alta_afip as c_alta_afip, t0.c_egreso_afip as c_egreso_afip, SEC.policy, t0.e_numero_legajo as CODE, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, t0.oi_empresa as oi_empresa, t0.oi_personal as oi_personal FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN t0.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id , t0.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal ORDER BY oi_personal_emp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp, SEC.policy FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_personal_emp asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-PER-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS DES FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp ={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select SEC.policy as policy, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp as ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as DES, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa as PARENT from NMD_SECURITY(NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp left outer SEC.Id, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL inner PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select SEC.policy as policy, Count(PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp) as CNT from NMD_SECURITY(NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp left outer SEC.Id, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL inner PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} GROUP BY SEC.policy')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp) as CNT from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL inner PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_EMPRESA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_CLASE_ORG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_clase_org = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa + \' POS\'} AND ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ESTRUC_PERS

resource.declare: <DATOS oi_referencia="1" pondPostulacion="0" pondInscripcion="0" ignorarCursos="1" ignorarEstudios="1" ignorarIdiomas="1" ignorarExperiencia="1" ignorarReferencia="1" ignorarPostulacion="1" postulados="0" oi_oferta_lab=""> <ROWS /> </DATOS>
resource.name: ListarIds
resource.description: Devuelve todos los IDs de oi_personal que corresponden a las personas de la empresa que no estan muertas ni jubiladas

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, 0 as oi_reclutado FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, SEL02_REQ, POS26_PERSONAL, POS26_PERS_POST, SEL02_REFERENCIAS {%?(#SOURCE:DATOS/@postulados='1') {% , SEL02_REF_PER%} {% %} %} JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER SEL02_REQ.oi_empresa, SEL02_REQ.oi_req INNER SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_req, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER POS26_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp, POS26_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp INNER POS26_PERS_POST.oi_personal_emp {%?(#SOURCE:DATOS/@postulados='1') {% , SEL02_REF_PER.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp %} {% %} %} WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.l_jubilado != 1 AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo = 1 AND SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia = {#SOURCE:DATOS/@oi_referencia} AND POS26_PERS_POST.oi_oferta_lab = {#SOURCE:DATOS/@oi_oferta_lab} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp not in (SELECT SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_referencia = {%= #SOURCE:DATOS/@oi_referencia %} AND isnotnull(SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp)) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, SEL02_REQ, SEL02_REFERENCIAS, POS26_PERSONAL, POS26_PERS_POST, SEL13_RECLUTADOS {%?(#SOURCE:DATOS/@postulados='1') {% , SEL02_REF_PER%} {% %} %} JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER SEL02_REQ.oi_empresa, SEL02_REQ.oi_req INNER SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_req, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER POS26_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp, POS26_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp INNER POS26_PERS_POST.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER sel13_reclutados.oi_personal_emp, SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_referencia INNER SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia {%?(#SOURCE:DATOS/@postulados='1') {% , SEL02_REF_PER.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp%} {% %} %} WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.l_jubilado != 1 AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo = 1 AND SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia = {#SOURCE:DATOS/@oi_referencia} AND POS26_PERS_POST.oi_oferta_lab = {#SOURCE:DATOS/@oi_oferta_lab} AND SEL13_RECLUTADOS.c_estado = \'N\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PARAMETRO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor, {%=#SOURCE:@oi_estructura%} AS oi_estructura FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro = \'diasFinContr\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PERSONAS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, {%=#SOURCE:@oi_estructura%} AS oi_estructura, {%=#SOURCE:@d_valor%} AS d_valor FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, ORG03_EMPRESAS, ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal = PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_personal_emp AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa AND ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.f_fin_contrato < ADDDAYS(NOW(), {%=#SOURCE:@d_valor%}) AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.f_fin_contrato > NOW() ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ESTRUCTURA
QRY_1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT ppos.oi_personal_emp, ppos.oi_posicion
FROM PER02_POSIC_PER as ppos
WHERE IsNull(ppos.f_egreso)
ORDER BY oi_posicion ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_unidad_org FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.d_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_estructura_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.o_clase_org, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.f_desde_vigencia FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_clase_org = \'{%=#SOURCE:@c_clase_org%}\' AND ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_auxattr
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG40_ATRIB_AUX.oi_atrib_aux, ORG40_ATRIB_AUX.c_atrib_aux, ORG40_ATRIB_AUX.d_atrib_aux FROM ORG40_ATRIB_AUX, ORG40_CLASES_AUX JOIN ORG40_ATRIB_AUX.oi_clase_aux INNER ORG40_CLASES_AUX.oi_clase_aux WHERE ORG40_CLASES_AUX.c_clase_aux = \'PER\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_EMPRESA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS {%? (#F:@oi_empresa != '') {% WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#F:@oi_empresa} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_datos_oi_clase_org
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT p.c_clase_org, p.d_clase_org FROM ORG02_CLASES_ORG as P WHERE p.oi_clase_org = {#F:@oi_clase_org} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_datos_oi_indic_activo
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT p.c_indic_activo, p.d_indic_activo FROM PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO as P WHERE p.oi_indic_activo = {#F:@oi_indic_activo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_datos_oi_tipo_personal
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT p.c_tipo_personal, p.d_tipo_personal FROM PER11_TIPOS_PERS as P WHERE p.oi_tipo_personal = {#F:@oi_tipo_personal} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_datos_oi_ctro_costo_ult
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT p.c_centro_costo , p.d_centro_costo FROM ORG08_CS_COSTO as P WHERE p.oi_centro_costo = {#F:@oi_ctro_costo_ult} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LEG
qry_split
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in split('40;{%=$PARAM/ROW/@oi_personal_emp%}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LEGAJO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT L.oi_indic_activo, L.oi_personal_emp,{%? (#F:@orden!=''){% {%= #F:@orden %} as Orden,%}{% %} %} L.e_numero_legajo,SEC.policy,L.f_ingreso,L.c_alta_afip,L.c_egreso_afip,A.d_indic_activo, L.f_antiguedad_rec,L.e_anios_antig,L.e_meses_antig,H.c_contrato,H.d_contrato,L.f_inicio_contrato, L.f_fin_contrato,L.e_duracion_ctrato,I.c_puesto,I.d_puesto, L.oi_posicion_ult,L.oi_funcion,L.f_egreso,J.c_motivo_eg_per, J.d_motivo_eg_per,K.c_centro_costo,K.d_centro_costo, KK.c_grupo_ccosto,KK.d_grupo_ccosto, L.oi_categoria_ult,L.n_est_pas_mes,O.c_tipo_personal, L.f_desde_categoria, L.l_afiliado_sind, L.f_afiliado_sind, O.d_tipo_personal,Q.c_obra_social,Q.d_obra_social,R.c_sindicato, R.d_sindicato,S.c_ubicacion,S.d_ubicacion,L.n_ult_remun, L.c_nro_interno,L.o_motivo_incorp,PER31.c_forma_pago,PER31.d_forma_pago, PER35.c_mod_contr,PER35.d_mod_contr, L.oi_personal, PER41.c_motivo_incorp,PER41.d_motivo_incorp, CALENDARIO.c_calendario, CALENDARIO.d_calendario, IIFISNULL(L.n_porc_jor_red,0) as n_porc_jor_red, ART.oi_art, ART.d_art, L.l_confidencial, L.f_obra_social, L.f_prestadora, P.c_prestadora,P.d_prestadora, PP.c_plan_presta,PP.d_plan_presta FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS L,PER01_PERSONAL AS PER, NMD_SECURITY AS SEC,PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO AS A,PER28_CONTRATOS AS H ,ORG04_PUESTOS AS I, PER22_MOT_EG_PER AS J, ORG08_CS_COSTO AS K ,ORG09_GR_CCOSTO AS KK ,PER11_TIPOS_PERS AS O, PER06_OBRAS_SOC AS Q, PER30_SINDICATOS AS R ,ORG03_UBICACIONES AS S ,PER31_FORMAS_PAGO AS PER31, PER35_MOD_CONTR AS PER35 ,PER41_MOT_INCORP AS PER41,ORG27_CAL_FERIADOS as CALENDARIO, PER33_ART as ART ,PER17_PRESTADORAS AS P ,PER17_PLANES_PREST AS PP JOIN L.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal, SEC.id INNER L.oi_personal_emp ,L.oi_indic_activo LEFT OUTER A.oi_indic_activo ,L.oi_contrato LEFT OUTER H.oi_contrato ,L.oi_puesto_ult LEFT OUTER I.oi_puesto ,L.oi_motivo_eg_per LEFT OUTER J.oi_motivo_eg_per ,L.oi_ctro_costo_ult LEFT OUTER K.oi_centro_costo ,K.oi_grupo_ccosto LEFT OUTER KK.oi_grupo_ccosto ,L.oi_tipo_personal LEFT OUTER O.oi_tipo_personal ,L.oi_obra_social LEFT OUTER Q.oi_obra_social ,L.oi_sindicato LEFT OUTER R.oi_sindicato ,L.oi_ubicacion LEFT OUTER S.oi_ubicacion ,L.oi_forma_pago LEFT OUTER PER31.oi_forma_pago ,L.oi_mod_contr LEFT OUTER PER35.oi_mod_contr ,L.oi_motivo_incorp LEFT OUTER PER41.oi_motivo_incorp ,L.oi_calendario_ult LEFT OUTER CALENDARIO.oi_calendario ,L.oi_art LEFT OUTER ART.oi_art ,L.oi_prestadora LEFT OUTER P.oi_prestadora ,L.oi_plan_presta LEFT OUTER PP.oi_plan_presta WHERE L.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@ids%}) AND SEC.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' ORDER BY {%? (#F:@orden!='') {% orden %} {% e_numero_legajo %} %} ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_UNIDAD_ORG1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org FROM ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_estructura INNER ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_clase_org = {#F:@oi_clase_org} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_UNIDAD_ORG2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org FROM ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG, ORG02_CLASES_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_clase_org INNER ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org, ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_estructura INNER ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org WHERE ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' AND ORG02_CLASES_ORG.l_automatica = 1 AND ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_pues_tray
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select ORG04_PUESTOS.c_puesto, ORG04_PUESTOS.d_puesto from PER02_PUESTO_PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG04_PUESTOS join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PUESTO_PER.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PUESTO_PER.oi_puesto INNER ORG04_PUESTOS.oi_puesto Where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} and PER02_PUESTO_PER.f_egreso = PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.f_egreso ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_FKS_LEG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT L.oi_indic_activo, L.oi_personal_emp, L.l_confidencial, DEP.c_departamento, DEP.d_departamento, SECTOR.c_sector, SECTOR.d_sector, POS.c_posicion,POS.d_posicion,POS.d_puesto, FUN.c_funcion,FUN.d_funcion,CAT.c_convenio,CAT.d_convenio, CAT.c_categoria,CAT.d_categoria FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS L, (SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, ORG04_POSICIONES.c_posicion, ORG04_POSICIONES.d_posicion, ORG04_PUESTOS.d_puesto, ORG04_POSICIONES.oi_departamento, ORG04_POSICIONES.oi_sector FROM ORG04_PUESTOS, ORG04_POSICIONES, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN ORG04_POSICIONES.oi_puesto INNER ORG04_PUESTOS.oi_puesto, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_posicion_ult LEFT OUTER ORG04_POSICIONES.oi_posicion ) AS POS, (SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, ORG03_FUNCIONES.c_funcion, ORG03_FUNCIONES.d_funcion FROM ORG03_FUNCIONES, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_funcion LEFT OUTER ORG03_FUNCIONES.oi_funcion ) AS FUN, (SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, ORG18_CONVENIOS.c_convenio, ORG18_CONVENIOS.d_convenio, ORG18_CATEGORIAS.c_categoria, ORG18_CATEGORIAS.d_categoria FROM ORG18_CONVENIOS, ORG18_CATEGORIAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN ORG18_CATEGORIAS.oi_convenio INNER ORG18_CONVENIOS.oi_convenio, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_categoria_ult LEFT OUTER ORG18_CATEGORIAS.oi_categoria ) AS CAT, ORG51_DEPARTAMENTOS as DEP, ORG51_SECTORES as SECTOR JOIN L.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER POS.oi_personal_emp, L.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER FUN.oi_personal_emp, L.oi_personal_emp INNER CAT.oi_personal_emp, POS.oi_departamento LEFT OUTER DEP.oi_departamento, POS.oi_sector LEFT OUTER SECTOR.oi_sector WHERE L.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $LEG/PER join $r/@oi_personal_emp inner $s/@oi_personal_emp

qry:select.name: qry_pos_tray
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select ORG04_POSICIONES.c_posicion, ORG04_POSICIONES.d_posicion from PER02_POSIC_PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG04_POSICIONES join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_POSIC_PER.oi_personal_emp, PER02_POSIC_PER.oi_posicion INNER ORG04_POSICIONES.oi_posicion Where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} and PER02_POSIC_PER.f_egreso = PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.f_egreso ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PERSONA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER.d_ape_y_nom,PER.oi_personal,PER.c_nro_cuil,L.oi_personal_emp, PER.oi_foto,PER.l_jubilado,B.c_tipo_documento, PER.c_nro_documento,PER.c_sexo,C.c_grupo_sanguineo, C.d_grupo_sanguineo,PER.f_nacim,PER.oi_local_nacim, PER.f_casamiento,D.c_nacionalidad,D.d_nacionalidad,E.c_idioma, E.d_idioma,ORG22.c_estado_civil,ORG22.d_estado_civil, F.c_titulo,F.d_titulo,G.c_afjp,G.d_afjp,PER.oi_localidad, PER.d_email,PER.te_celular,DOM.te_1,DOM.d_calle,DOM.e_numero, DOM.d_piso,DOM.d_departamento,PRO.d_provincia,ORG19.d_localidad, N.c_nivel_estudio,N.d_nivel_estudio, PER.c_nro_camisa, PER.c_nro_pantalon, PER.c_nro_calzado, PER.c_nro_chomba, PER.c_nro_buzo, PER.c_nro_campera, PER.oi_usuario_sistema FROM PER01_PERSONAL AS PER,PER20_TIPOS_DOC AS B,PER10_GRUPOS_SANG AS C ,ORG12_NACIONALID AS D, ORG20_IDIOMAS AS E, ORG22_EST_CIVIL AS ORG22 ,PER04_TITULOS AS F, PER03_AFJP AS G,ORG19_LOCALIDADES AS ORG19 ,ORG35_PROVINCIAS AS PRO,PER01_DOMIC_PER(l_domic_fiscal = \'1\') AS DOM ,PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS L,PER12_NIVELES_EST AS N JOIN L.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal ,PER.oi_tipo_documento LEFT OUTER B.oi_tipo_documento ,PER.oi_grupo_sanguineo LEFT OUTER C.oi_grupo_sanguineo ,PER.oi_nacionalidad LEFT OUTER D.oi_nacionalidad ,PER.oi_idioma LEFT OUTER E.oi_idioma ,PER.oi_nivel_estudio LEFT OUTER N.oi_nivel_estudio ,PER.oi_estado_civil LEFT OUTER ORG22.oi_estado_civil ,PER.oi_titulo LEFT OUTER F.oi_titulo ,PER.oi_afjp LEFT OUTER G.oi_afjp ,PER.oi_personal LEFT OUTER DOM.oi_personal ,DOM.oi_localidad LEFT OUTER ORG19.oi_localidad ,ORG19.oi_provincia LEFT OUTER PRO.oi_provincia WHERE L.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $LEG/PER join $r/@oi_personal_emp inner $s/@oi_personal_emp

qry:select.name: QRY_FKS_PER
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER.oi_personal, LOC.d_localidad,LOC.d_provincia,LOC.d_pais, LOCNAC.d_loc_nacim,LOCNAC.d_prov_nacim, LOCNAC.d_pais_nacim,L.oi_personal_emp FROM PER01_PERSONAL as PER,PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS L, (SELECT PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_localidad, ORG35_PROVINCIAS.d_provincia, ORG35_PAISES.d_pais FROM PER01_PERSONAL, ORG19_LOCALIDADES, ORG35_PROVINCIAS, ORG35_PAISES JOIN ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_provincia INNER ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_provincia, ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_pais INNER ORG35_PAISES.oi_pais, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_localidad INNER ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad ) AS LOC, (SELECT PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad, ORG19_LOCALIDADES.d_localidad as d_loc_nacim, ORG35_PROVINCIAS.d_provincia as d_prov_nacim, ORG35_PAISES.d_pais as d_pais_nacim FROM PER01_PERSONAL, ORG19_LOCALIDADES, ORG35_PROVINCIAS, ORG35_PAISES JOIN ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_provincia INNER ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_provincia, ORG35_PROVINCIAS.oi_pais INNER ORG35_PAISES.oi_pais, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_local_nacim INNER ORG19_LOCALIDADES.oi_localidad ) AS LOCNAC JOIN L.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal ,PER.oi_personal LEFT OUTER LOC.oi_personal ,PER.oi_personal LEFT OUTER LOCNAC.oi_personal WHERE L.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@ids%}) ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $LEG/PER join $r/@oi_personal_emp inner $s/@oi_personal_emp

qry:select.name: QRY_CLASE_ORG_PER
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_personal_emp, {%=#PARAM:@oi_empresa%} AS oi_empresa FROM ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS WHERE ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_clase_org = {#F:@oi_clase_org} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: auxattr
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER01_ATRIB_PER.oi_personal, PER01_ATRIB_PER.oi_atrib_per, PER01_ATRIB_PER.d_atrib_per, ORG40_ATRIB_AUX.c_atrib_aux FROM PER01_ATRIB_PER, ORG40_ATRIB_AUX JOIN PER01_ATRIB_PER.oi_atrib_aux INNER ORG40_ATRIB_AUX.oi_atrib_aux ')/ROWS/ROW, $s in $LEG/PER join $r/@oi_personal inner $s/@oi_personal

qry:select.name: qry_split
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in split('40;{%=$PARAM/ROW/@oi_personal_emp%}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_USUARIO_SISTEMA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in file('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Entidades\\{%=#PARAM:@oi_usuario_sistema%}.ENTIDAD.XML')/ENTIDAD

qry:select.name: QRY_SUPERIOR
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT PERSUP.d_ape_y_nom as d_superior FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PEREMP, ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS as ESTACT, ORG02_CLASES_ORG as CORG, ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS as EST, ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS as ESTSUP, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as SUP, PER01_PERSONAL as PERSUP JOIN PEREMP.oi_personal_emp INNER ESTACT.oi_personal_emp, ESTACT.oi_clase_org INNER CORG.oi_clase_org, ESTACT.oi_estructura LEFT OUTER EST.oi_estructura, EST.oi_estr_padre LEFT OUTER ESTSUP.oi_estructura, ESTSUP.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SUP.oi_personal_emp, SUP.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PERSUP.oi_personal WHERE PEREMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} and CORG.c_estado = \'V\' and CORG.l_automatica = 1
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_DET_POS_PUE
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT PUE.d_puesto, BAN.d_banda_sal, CATPUE.d_categoria as d_cat_puesto, CONPUE.d_convenio as d_con_puesto, POS.d_posicion, NS.d_nivel_sal, CATPOS.d_categoria as d_cat_pos, CONPos.d_convenio as d_con_pos, CC.d_centro_costo as d_cc_pos FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PEREMP, ORG04_PUESTOS as PUE, ORG04_POSICIONES as POS, ORG17_BANDAS_SAL as BAN, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as CATPUE, ORG18_CONVENIOS as CONPUE, ORG17_NIVELES_SAL as NS, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as CATPOS, ORG18_CONVENIOS as CONPOS, ORG08_CS_COSTO as CC JOIN PEREMP.oi_posicion_ult LEFT OUTER POS.oi_posicion, PEREMP.oi_puesto_ult LEFT OUTER PUE.oi_puesto, PUE.oi_banda_sal LEFT OUTER BAN.oi_banda_sal, PUE.oi_categoria LEFT OUTER CATPUE.oi_categoria, CATPUE.oi_convenio LEFT OUTER CONPUE.oi_convenio, POS.oi_nivel_sal LEFT OUTER NS.oi_nivel_sal, POS.oi_categoria LEFT OUTER CATPOS.oi_categoria, CATPOS.oi_convenio LEFT OUTER CONPOS.oi_convenio, POS.oi_centro_costo LEFT OUTER CC.oi_centro_costo where PEREMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <DATOS oi_referencia="311" pondPostulacion="0" pondInscripcion="0" ignorarCursos="1" ignorarEstudios="1" ignorarIdiomas="1" ignorarExperiencia="1" ignorarReferencia="1" oi_empresa="13" oi_req="409" ignorarAreas="1" postulados="1"> <ROWS /> </DATOS>
resource.name: ListarIdsPost
resource.description: Devuelve todos los IDs de oi_personal que corresponden a las personas de la empresa que no estan muertas ni jubiladas

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, 0 as oi_reclutado FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL , SEL02_REF_PER, SEL02_REFERENCIAS JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal , SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia INNER SEL02_REF_PER.oi_referencia , SEL02_REF_PER.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.l_jubilado != 1 AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo = 1 AND SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia = {#SOURCE:DATOS/@oi_referencia} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp not in (SELECT SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp FROM SEL13_RECLUTADOS WHERE SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_referencia = {%= #SOURCE:DATOS/@oi_referencia %} AND isnotnull(SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_personal_emp)) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_reclutado FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, SEL02_REQ, SEL02_REFERENCIAS, SEL13_RECLUTADOS , SEL02_REF_PER JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER SEL02_REQ.oi_empresa, SEL02_REQ.oi_req INNER SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_req, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER sel13_reclutados.oi_personal_emp, SEL13_RECLUTADOS.oi_referencia INNER SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia , SEL02_REF_PER.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.l_jubilado != 1 AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo = 1 AND SEL02_REFERENCIAS.oi_referencia = {#SOURCE:DATOS/@oi_referencia} AND SEL13_RECLUTADOS.c_estado = \'N\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LIC
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia_per FROM PER02_LICEN_PER WHERE PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio = {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_inicio)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LIC
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER16_LICENCIAS.c_licencia FROM PER16_LICENCIAS WHERE PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia = {#PARAM:@oi_licencia} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Trae todas las Estructuras Pers para un oi_personal_emp
resource.name: QRY_ESTRUCTURA_PERS_ULT

qry:select.name: QRY_ESTRUC_PERS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_estruc_pers FROM ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS, ORG02_CLASES_ORG JOIN ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_clase_org INNER ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org WHERE ORG02_ESTRUC_PERS.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} AND ORG02_CLASES_ORG.c_estado = \'V\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG.oi_personal_emp, LEG.e_numero_legajo, PER.d_nombres, PER.d_apellido, PER.d_email, EMP.d_empresa FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP JOIN LEG.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa WHERE PER.oi_usuario_sistema = \'{%=#PARAM:@oi_usuario_sistema%}\' AND LEG.oi_indic_activo = 1 ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1

qry:attribute.name: return
qry:attribute.value: 'SUPERA LA CANTIDAD MÁXIMA DE DÍAS PERMITIDOS.'

qry:attribute.name: return
qry:attribute.value: 'SUPERA LA CANTIDAD MÁXIMA DE DÍAS ANUALES PERMITIDOS.'

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIC.oi_licencia as LICENCIA_VAL, LIC.d_licencia as LICENCIA_DES, LIC_PER.oi_licencia_per as OI_LIC_PER, LIC_PER.f_inicio as F_INICIO, LIC_PER.f_fin as F_FIN FROM PER16_LICENCIAS as LIC, PER02_LICEN_PER as LIC_PER, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG JOIN LIC.oi_licencia INNER LIC_PER.oi_licencia, LIC_PER.oi_personal_emp INNER LEG.oi_personal_emp WHERE LEG.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND ( (LIC_PER.f_inicio <= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_inicio)} AND LIC_PER.f_fin >= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_inicio)}) OR (LIC_PER.f_inicio <= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_fin)} AND LIC_PER.f_fin >= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_fin)}) OR (LIC_PER.f_inicio <= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_inicio)} AND LIC_PER.f_fin >= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_fin)}) OR (LIC_PER.f_inicio >= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_inicio)} AND LIC_PER.f_fin <= {Datetime(#PARAM:@f_fin)}) ) ')ROWS/ROW

qry:attribute.name: return
qry:attribute.value: 'SE SOLAPA CON LA LICENCIA DEL ' + format-date($r/@F_INICIO, 'dd/mm/yyyy') + ' AL ' + format-date($r/@F_FIN, 'dd/mm/yyyy') + '.'

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CAT.oi_convenio FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as CAT JOIN LEG.oi_categoria_ult INNER CAT.oi_categoria WHERE LEG.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_conv
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIC_CONV.e_max_dias_lic, LIC_CONV.e_max_dias_anio FROM PER16_LIC_CONV as LIC_CONV, PER16_LICENCIAS as LIC JOIN LIC.oi_licencia INNER LIC_CONV.oi_licencia WHERE LIC_CONV.oi_convenio = {#PARAM:@oi_convenio} AND LIC_CONV.oi_licencia = {#PARAM:@oi_licencia} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql_licen
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIC.e_max_dias_lic, LIC.e_max_dias_anio FROM PER16_LICENCIAS as LIC WHERE LIC.oi_licencia = {#PARAM:@oi_licencia} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: licen_ano
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SUM(PER02_LICEN_PER.e_cant_dias) as diasTomados FROM PER02_LICEN_PER WHERE PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia = {#PARAM:@oi_licencia} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.e_anio_corresp = {#PARAM:@e_anio_corresp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG.oi_personal_emp, LEG.e_numero_legajo, PER.d_nombres, PER.d_apellido, EMP.d_empresa FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP JOIN LEG.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa WHERE PER.oi_usuario_sistema = \'{%=#PARAM:@oi_usuario_sistema%}\' AND LEG.oi_indic_activo = 1 ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP.QUERY

for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PARENT={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select SEC.policy as policy, Count(PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp) as CNT from NMD_SECURITY(NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp left outer SEC.Id, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.OI_PERSONAL inner PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} GROUP BY SEC.policy')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Devuelve el oi y descripcion del convenio que tiene el legajo.
resource.name: QRY_GetConvenioLeg

qry:select.name: sql1
SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT COUNT(PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia_per) as CNT
FROM PER02_LICEN_PER
WHERE PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp = {$PARAM/@oi_personal_emp} AND (PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio <= {Datetime($PARAM/@f_inicio)} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.f_fin >= {Datetime($PARAM/@f_inicio)} OR PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio <= {Datetime($PARAM/@f_fin)} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.f_fin >= {Datetime($PARAM/@f_fin)} OR PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio >= {Datetime($PARAM/@f_inicio)} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.f_fin <= {Datetime($PARAM/@f_fin)})
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT SUM(PER02_LICEN_PER.e_cant_dias) as SUM
FROM PER02_LICEN_PER
WHERE PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp = {$PARAM/@oi_personal_emp} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia = {$PARAM/@oi_licencia} AND PER02_LICEN_PER.e_anio_corresp = {$PARAM/@anio}
')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Recupera datos del legajo por oi_personal_emp
method.name: GetLegajoPorOI

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LEG.e_numero_legajo, PER.d_nombres, PER.d_apellido, PER.d_email, EMP.c_empresa, EMP.d_empresa, EMP.oi_empresa, LEG.l_afiliado_sind, LEG.c_nro_interno, LEG.l_disponib_viajar, LEG.oi_ubicacion, LEG.oi_tipo_personal, UBI.d_ubicacion, CONV.c_convenio, CONV.d_convenio, TPER.c_tipo_personal
FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as LEG, PER01_PERSONAL as PER, ORG03_EMPRESAS as EMP, ORG03_UBICACIONES as UBI, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as CAT, ORG18_CONVENIOS as CONV, PER11_TIPOS_PERS as TPER
JOIN LEG.oi_personal INNER PER.oi_personal, LEG.oi_empresa INNER EMP.oi_empresa, LEG.oi_ubicacion LEFT UBI.oi_ubicacion, LEG.oi_categoria_ult LEFT CAT.oi_categoria, LEG.oi_tipo_personal LEFT TPER.oi_tipo_personal, CAT.oi_convenio LEFT CONV.oi_convenio
WHERE LEG.oi_personal_emp = \'{%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp%}\' AND LEG.oi_indic_activo = 1 ')ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Devuelve las ubicaciones por las que paso un legajo
resource.name: QRY_UbicacionesPorLegajo

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT UBI_PER.oi_ubicacion, UBI_PER.f_desde, UBI_PER.f_hasta, UBI.d_ubicacion FROM PER02_UBIC_PER as UBI_PER, ORG03_UBICACIONES as UBI JOIN UBI_PER.oi_ubicacion INNER UBI.oi_ubicacion WHERE UBI_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#FILTER:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY f_desde DESC ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Devulve las licencias con codigo de vacaciones para un legajo
resource.name: GET_VACACIONES_PER

qry:select.name: qry_VacacionesPer
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIC_PER.e_anio_corresp,LIC_PER.f_inicio as f_inicio,LIC_PER.f_fin,LIC_PER.e_cant_dias
FROM PER02_LICEN_PER as LIC_PER
WHERE LIC_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#FILTER:@oi_personal_emp} AND LIC_PER.oi_licencia = 106 AND LIC_PER.f_inicio >= STRING2DATE({%= #PARAM:@fi %}) AND LIC_PER.f_inicio <= STRING2DATE({%= #PARAM:@ff %})
ORDER BY f_inicio DESC ')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Determina si es un dia laboral para el legajo
method.name: DiaLaboral

resource.name: QRY_CONCATEGULT
resource.description: Retorna el convenio y la categoria UTLIMO del legajo

qry:select.name: QRY_CONCATEG
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT CONV.oi_convenio as oi_convenio, CONV.c_convenio as c_convenio, CONV.d_convenio as d_convenio, CAT.oi_categoria as oi_categoria, CAT.c_categoria as c_categoria, CAT.d_categoria as d_categoria FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as PER_EMP, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as CAT, ORG18_CONVENIOS as CONV JOIN PER_EMP.oi_categoria_ult INNER CAT.oi_categoria, CAT.oi_convenio INNER CONV.oi_convenio WHERE PER_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:/@oi_personal_emp}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_personal
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.l_afiliado_sind FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS JOIN ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa where PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@e_numero_legajo} and ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa = {#SOURCE:@c_empresa}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.name: QRY_PERSONAS_LIC
resource.description: Obtiene las personas de un conjunto de licencias

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #SOURCE:LICENCIAS/LIC

qry:select.name: RS2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #FILTRO:LICENCIAS/LIC[@oi_personal_emp = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp%}]

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.c_nro_documento, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER01_PERSONAL.d_email FROM PER01_PERSONAL WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.oi_usuario_sistema = \'\' and PER01_PERSONAL.d_email != \'\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_parametro_tiempo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro, ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_modulo = \'PER\' AND ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro IN (\'TENTREMAILS\')
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_parametro_asunto
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro, ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_modulo = \'PER\' AND ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro IN (\'ASUNTOMAILS\')
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_parametro_cuerpo
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro, ORG26_PARAMETROS.o_parametro FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_modulo = \'PER\' AND ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro IN (\'CUERPOMAILS\')
')/ROWS/ROW

method.label: Marca el legajo como legajo por defecto
method.name: MarcarDefecto

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp != {#SOURCE:@oi_personal_emp} and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal} ')/ROWS/ROW

class.name: ALQUILER_PER
class.note: Registra los alquileres de viviendas que la Empresa otorga al Personal.\\
class.help: Registra los alquileres de viviendas que la Empresa otorga al Personal.
class.label: Alquiler Personal

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

attribute.description: Fecha de Inicio del Alquiler.
attribute.label: Fecha Inicio
attribute.name: f_inicio

attribute.description: Fecha de Finalización del alquiler.
attribute.label: Fecha Fin
attribute.name: f_fin

attribute.description: Importe del Alquiler.
attribute.label: Importe Alquiler
attribute.name: n_imp_alquiler

attribute.description: Tiene Póliza? (S | N).
attribute.label: Poliza
attribute.name: l_poliza

attribute.description: Número de Póliza.
attribute.label: Número Póliza
attribute.name: c_poliza

attribute.description: Duración de la Póliza.
attribute.label: Duración Póliza
attribute.name: e_duracion_poliza

attribute.description: Premio total.
attribute.label: Premio Total
attribute.name: n_premio_total

attribute.description: Observación de Alquiler. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 1000 caracteres.
attribute.label: Observación Alquiler
attribute.name: o_alquiler

assosiation.note: Registra las Licencias que toma el Personal por Periodo.\\
assosiation.description: Registra las Licencias que toma el Personal por Periodo.
assosiation.label: Distribucion por Años
assosiation.name: LIC_PERIODO

qry:select.name: sql1
IDS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
{%?(#FILTER:@LEN='') {% %} {% MAXSIZE {%=#FILTER:@LEN %} %} %}
SELECT SEC.policy, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia_per AS ID, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp AS PARENT, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa AS CEMP, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa AS DEMP, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo AS NLEG, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom AS NYA, PER16_LICENCIAS.c_licencia AS CLIC, PER16_LICENCIAS.d_licencia AS DLIC, PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio AS f_inicio
FROM NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\') as SEC, PER02_LICEN_PER, PER16_LICENCIAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, ORG03_EMPRESAS
JOIN PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp LEFT OUTER SEC.id, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia INNER PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa
WHERE 1=1 {%?($FILTER/@parent!='') {% AND PARENT={$FILTER/@parent} %} {% %} %} {%?($FILTER/@search!='') {% AND (contain(ucase(CEMP),{upper-case($FILTER/@search)}) OR contain(ucase(DEMP),{upper-case($FILTER/@search)}) OR contain(ucase(NLEG),{upper-case($FILTER/@search)}) OR contain(ucase(NYA),{upper-case($FILTER/@search)}) OR contain(ucase(CLIC),{upper-case($FILTER/@search)}) OR contain(ucase(DLIC),{upper-case($FILTER/@search)})) %} {% %} %}
ORDER BY f_inicio DESC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL('
SELECT PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia_per, ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa, ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER16_LICENCIAS.c_licencia, PER16_LICENCIAS.d_licencia, PER02_LICEN_PER.f_inicio, PER02_LICEN_PER.f_fin, PER02_LICEN_PER.e_cant_dias, PER02_LICEN_PER.e_anio_corresp, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_familiar_per
FROM PER02_LICEN_PER, PER16_LICENCIAS, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, ORG03_EMPRESAS
JOIN PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia INNER PER16_LICENCIAS.oi_licencia, PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa INNER ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa
WHERE PER02_LICEN_PER.oi_licencia_per IN ({%=$PARAM/@IDS%})
')/ROWS/ROW
